# USS TJR Engineering Instructions

USS TJR is a lightweight Star Trek-inspired personal operating system.

Rules:
- Use plain HTML, CSS and JavaScript
- Do not introduce frameworks unless explicitly requested
- Preserve Captain’s Log functionality
- Make small, reviewable changes
- Do not change unrelated files
- Explain all modified files
- Prefer readability over cleverness
- Keep styling consistent with USS TJR theme

Before completion:
- Check navigation
- Check for broken links
- Check JavaScript console errors
- Confirm mobile usability
